{{Quote|Wermyn, I just want you to know how much I admire and respect you for your years of service. I regret that your retirement cannot be as long and as happy as I had hoped it would be. Once again, accept my appreciation. Thank you.|Tol Sivron to Wermyn|<ref name="CotF" />}}
'''Wermyn''' was an [[Aquellan]] in charge of plant operations and keeping the [[Maw Installation]] up-and-running. One-handed, he wore the traditional green-purple [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] found on all [[Aquella]]n [[Gender/Legends|men]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|All these procedures have been approved, Director, but I don't quite follow our next step. How is my team going to get to safety? In fact, how are any of us going to get to safety once I've set up the chain reaction?|Wermyn to Tol Sivron during the Battle of the Maw|<ref name="CotF" />}}
During the [[Battle of the Maw]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], he sabotaged the Installations power generators, though when he was captured by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]], he offered to repair the damage.<ref name="CotF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}
